executive_summary.cost_impact: Estimated 300% token overhead vs optimal implementation

java-test-driven-development.md.evidence: 460 lines to do what Spring Boot Generator does in 50 lines
java-test-driven-development.md.recommendation: Trim 60% of thinking overhead, keep core TDD logic

ultrathink.md.evidence: 357 lines to ask clarifying questions. VSCode does this in 2 clicks.
ultrathink.md.recommendation: Strip metacognitive navel-gazing, keep question generation

intelligent-refactor-session.md.evidence: 534 lines with 62 thinking blocks for file refactoring. IntelliJ's 'Extract Method' laughs at this complexity.
intelligent-refactor-session.md.recommendation: Nuclear refactor: extract 80% of thinking overhead, keep state management

safe-code-beautifier.md.evidence: 99 thinking blocks (23.2% of all lines) to format code. Prettier does this with ZERO configuration.
safe-code-beautifier.md.recommendation: DELETE AND START OVER. This is 1600% more complex than it needs to be.

adaptive-complexity-router.md.evidence: 499 lines to route thinking complexity. A simple if-else would suffice for 95% of cases.
adaptive-complexity-router.md.recommendation: Simplify to 50-line complexity router, eliminate meta-orchestration

composition_analysis.evidence: ALL 5 COMMANDS try to orchestrate thinking independently
composition_analysis.impact: Commands will fight each other for MCP resources
composition_analysis.analogy: 5 conductors trying to lead the same orchestra
composition_analysis.recommendation: Designate ONE orchestration command, make others orchestration-agnostic

overthinking_pandemic.symptom: Thinking blocks exceed 15% of total lines

documentation_obesity.cure: Documentation diet - max 5 examples per command

integration_schizophrenia.cure: Show, don't tell - replace talk with working examples

token_efficiency.verdict: ALL commands exceed industry baseline by 59-375%

immediate_actions: DELETE safe-code-beautifier.md and rewrite from scratch
Remove 80% of thinking blocks from intelligent-refactor-session.md
Implement token budgets (max 5000 tokens per command)
architectural_changes: Single orchestration layer instead of per-command orchestration
Shared thinking utilities instead of duplicated thinking patterns
Simple command interface with complex backend, not complex interface
Focus on DOING rather than THINKING ABOUT DOING
performance_targets: Target: <10 maintainability debt units per command

savage_final_verdict.summary: Your commands suffer from ACUTE OVERTHINKING SYNDROME
savage_final_verdict.evidence: 68.91 maintainability debt units in worst case (6.9x critical threshold)
savage_final_verdict.treatment: Radical simplification therapy - remove 70% of meta-cognitive overhead
savage_final_verdict.analogy: You've built a 500-room mansion to store a pencil

measurements_taken: Complexity scoring based on structural elements
